name: @prune/cache-poison
description: F21 — cache-poisoning economics. f7 semantic-cache defends a single entry's content-SHA; this attributes ECONOMIC harm to a WRITER identity: per writer it tracks the equivalence-rejection rate (poisoned entries that fail the gate) and the near-key-collision rate (entries crafted to force misses / wrong-then-retry), and quarantines a writer above threshold by recommending REVALIDATION (never deletion). Deterministic rate accounting over caller-fed write outcomes; fail-open (advisory); no model call, no regex.
